caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is seated in a recording studio with dark gray, sound-absorbing acoustic foam walls. He is wearing large black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a logo that reads "Stay Authentic". A professional condenser microphone on a swivel arm is positioned directly in front of him. Initially, the man looks toward the microphone with a slight smile. As time progresses, he brings his hand up to his face, momentarily covering his mouth. He then lowers his hand and breaks into a wide, open-mouthed smile, looking slightly off-camera. The equipment remains stationary throughout the sequence, and the man remains centered in the shot, shifting only his facial expression and the position of his hand.
